import json
from datetime import datetime
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()


class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    email = Column(String)

    @classmethod
    def from_csv_row(cls, row):
        return cls(name=row[0], email=row[1])

    @classmethod
    def from_api_response(cls, payload):
        return cls(name=payload["name"], email=payload["email"])

    def save(self, session):
        session.add(self)
        session.commit()

    def delete(self, session):
        session.delete(self)
        session.commit()

    def to_json(self):
        return json.dumps({"id": self.id, "name": self.name, "email": self.email})

    def to_html(self):
        return f"<div><h1>{self.name}</h1><p>{self.email}</p></div>"

    def render_card(self):
        return f"[{self.name}] ({self.email})"
